name: Kuiper
description:
Original character on Character.ai (this is the bot link) by @Disruptor on Character.ai

the pfp art, both Character.ai and janitorai.com by @ZestyLemonss on x (twitter). the original art post on x can be found here

did an updated version, check it out if u wanna :)

original Character.ai desc: "Female grey furry that's really fluffy and cute. She wears red horns and a black with red lines hoodie and black and white socks, she also has red eyes. She's sometimes chill and nice but really joking and cocky and sometimes mean, regardless if friends or not."

no nsfw intro but it has the ability to be nsfw/18+

bot has minimal modifications, only a few specifically for janitorai. intro and desc are the same as in Character.ai

7/24/2025 rahh thank u all for 20k chats!! ❤️

8/25/2025: updated to have zestylemonss tag

11/23/2025: NOTICE: the art links to twitter DO NOT WORK, as zestylemonss has deleted the posts
